subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in God and His Kingdom, praise God and render thanks unto Him for the bounties He hath bestowed upon thee and thy consort [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالله و ملکوته احمد الله و اشکره بما انعم علیک و علی قرینتک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
